args.subject: Summary of Client Meeting and Next Steps
args.body:
Dear John,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm sending a summary of our recent client meeting.

During our meeting on May 5, 2024, we discussed your requirements for the new project, agreed on the project timeline and key milestones, and reviewed the initial design concepts. We've incorporated your feedback and are moving forward with the project.

I'm pleased to confirm that our next meeting is scheduled for June 1, 2024. We'll continue to make progress on the action items discussed, including updating the project plan and initiating the development phase.

Please find the meeting minutes attached for your reference. If you have any questions or additional feedback before our next meeting, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Best regards,

Emma Johnson
Blue Sparrow Tech
